name: SKIBIDI TOILET: Operation Terror
short_description: The Skibidi has escaped. Your mission: retrieve 10 vials of Toilet water for DARPA to synthesize into a poison against it. Carefully observe each stall to escape the Endless Bathrooms, avoid the Skibidi, and reach 'Room 10'
detailed_description:
US Military: Operation 'Bath House'

The Skibidi has escaped.

You are a soldier sent down into the Skibidi's lair, to retrieve 10 viable samples of the Toilet water this creature inhabits.

Intelligence shows that water is its source of power.

Every molecule of the Skibidi exudes radiation, which leaks into the water it lives in.

DARPA scientists have found a way to synthesize this water into a poison, lethal to its kind.

However, once you enter the Skibidi's lair, you may never leave.

Spot the procedurally-generated anomalies, go through the right doors, and you just might reach Room 10 alive...

Skibidi Toilet: Operation Terror is a short psychological horror game, set in an endless maze of bathroom stalls, which can only be escaped through observing each stall carefully.

Inspired by The Exit 8, a truly wonderful game, ST:OT is my first horror game.

Play Time

10-20 minutes per playthrough. Infinite variations.
